title: alangium platanifolium f. velutinum
intro: Alangium platanifolium f. velutinum is a variant of the Alangium platanifolium plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Alangiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alangium platanifolium f. velutinum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Alangium platanifolium f. velutinum can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or powder, which is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
